name: aws_s3
summary: Writes each message as an object to an AWS S3 bucket.

bucket.description: S3 bucket name to write to.

path.description: Object key path. Supports Bloblang interpolation.

content_type.description: Content-Type header for the uploaded object.

storage_class.description: S3 storage class for the object.

region.description: AWS region. Defaults to AWS_REGION env var.

endpoint.description: Custom endpoint URL for S3-compatible services (e.g. MinIO).

max_in_flight.description: Maximum number of parallel upload operations.

credentials.description: AWS credentials. Omit to use the default credential chain.
